Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class OrderCostPreviewResponse

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.OrderCostPreviewResponse
public class OrderCostPreviewResponse extends Object
OrderCostPreviewResponse - Preview of estimated costs for a chosen quantity, asset, capacity, and limit price

    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EstimatedAccruedInterest>
    estimatedAccruedInterest()
    The estimated total of accrued interest that would be exchanged in an order of the given quantity
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EstimatedGrossAmount>
    estimatedGrossAmount()
    The principal amount involved, which is the notional value of the underlying assets that would be exchanged for the given quantity
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EstimatedGrossCreditAmount>
    estimatedGrossCreditAmount()
    Customer disclosure of the estimated gross credit (fee / markup) amount retained by broker based given the price adjustment schedule configured for orders executed in a principal capacity for a given quantity, and limit price.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EstimatedNetAmount>
    estimatedNetAmount()
    The estimated net notional amount involved in an order of the given quantity, capacity, and limit price.

    • OrderCostPreviewResponse

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse(Optional<String> accountId, Optional<String> assetId, Optional<? extends OrderCostPreviewResponseAssetType> assetType, Optional<? extends OrderCostPreviewResponseBrokerCapacity> brokerCapacity, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EstimatedAccruedInterest> estimatedAccruedInterest, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EstimatedGrossAmount> estimatedGrossAmount, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EstimatedGrossCreditAmount> estimatedGrossCreditAmount, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EstimatedNetAmount> estimatedNetAmount, Optional<String> identifier, Optional<? extends OrderCostPreviewResponseIdentifierType> identifierType, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends OrderCostPreviewResponseLimitPrice> limitPrice, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends OrderCostPreviewResponseQuantity> quantity, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> responseGenerationTime)

  • Method Details

    • accountId

      public Optional<String> accountId()
      The account id used in calculating order costs

    • assetId

      public Optional<String> assetId()
      Apex Asset ID for this asset.

    • assetType

      public Optional<OrderCostPreviewResponseAssetType> assetType()
      The type of asset referenced by the security identifier

    • brokerCapacity

      public Optional<OrderCostPreviewResponseBrokerCapacity> brokerCapacity()
      Capacity used in determining the order cost. Defaults to "AGENCY" if no value specified.

    • estimatedAccruedInterest

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EstimatedAccruedInterest> estimatedAccruedInterest()
      The estimated total of accrued interest that would be exchanged in an order of the given quantity

    • estimatedGrossAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EstimatedGrossAmount> estimatedGrossAmount()
      The principal amount involved, which is the notional value of the underlying assets that would be exchanged for the given quantity

    • estimatedGrossCreditAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EstimatedGrossCreditAmount> estimatedGrossCreditAmount()
      Customer disclosure of the estimated gross credit (fee / markup) amount retained by broker based given the price adjustment schedule configured for orders executed in a principal capacity for a given quantity, and limit price. This amount is priced into the estimated_gross_credit_amount and is not separately charged explicitly.

    • estimatedNetAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EstimatedNetAmount> estimatedNetAmount()
      The estimated net notional amount involved in an order of the given quantity, capacity, and limit price. This will be the sum of the estimated gross amount and accrued interest, rounded to two decimal places. (For orders in the principal capacity, this total will include mark-up/mark-down price adjustments.)

    • identifier

      public Optional<String> identifier()
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public Optional<OrderCostPreviewResponseIdentifierType> identifierType()
      The identifier type of the asset used for price calculations. This will be the same value as what was sent on the request.

    • limitPrice

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OrderCostPreviewResponseLimitPrice> limitPrice()
      The limit price to use in calculating costs. Only PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR will be accepted and returned.

    • quantity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OrderCostPreviewResponseQuantity> quantity()
      The quantity of the designated asset that would be ordered. For Fixed Income: Expressed in the par (face-value) amount and may not exceed two decimal places for USD-based currencies.

    • responseGenerationTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> responseGenerationTime()
      The time the response was generated by the system

    • builder

      public static final OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder builder()

    • withEstimatedGrossCreditAmount

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse withEstimatedGrossCreditAmount(EstimatedGrossCreditAmount estimatedGrossCreditAmount)
      Customer disclosure of the estimated gross credit (fee / markup) amount retained by broker based given the price adjustment schedule configured for orders executed in a principal capacity for a given quantity, and limit price. This amount is priced into the estimated_gross_credit_amount and is not separately charged explicitly.

    • withEstimatedGrossCreditAmount

      Customer disclosure of the estimated gross credit (fee / markup) amount retained by broker based given the price adjustment schedule configured for orders executed in a principal capacity for a given quantity, and limit price. This amount is priced into the estimated_gross_credit_amount and is not separately charged explicitly.

    • withEstimatedNetAmount

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse withEstimatedNetAmount(EstimatedNetAmount estimatedNetAmount)
      The estimated net notional amount involved in an order of the given quantity, capacity, and limit price. This will be the sum of the estimated gross amount and accrued interest, rounded to two decimal places. (For orders in the principal capacity, this total will include mark-up/mark-down price adjustments.)

    • withEstimatedNetAmount

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse withEstimatedNetAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EstimatedNetAmount> estimatedNetAmount)
      The estimated net notional amount involved in an order of the given quantity, capacity, and limit price. This will be the sum of the estimated gross amount and accrued interest, rounded to two decimal places. (For orders in the principal capacity, this total will include mark-up/mark-down price adjustments.)
